hero.title: Christ's Mission Church - Mizpah
hero.subtitle: A home of apostolic missions, deep worship, prayer, prophesy, miracles, discipleship, community and victorious living in righteousness.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.intro: Christ's Mission Church - Mizpah is called to watch, expand the Kingdom, exercise spiritual dominion, and occupy faithfully until Jesus returns.

items.title: To Watch
items.summary: To remain alert in prayer, spiritual discernment, and faithful obedience.

items.title: Expand the Kingdom
items.summary: To preach, disciple, baptize, and teach the whole counsel of Jesus Christ.

items.title: Exercise Spiritual Dominion
items.summary: To minister in faith, prayer, signs, and the authority of Christ.

items.title: Occupy Until Jesus Returns
items.summary: To serve, steward, build, and remain fruitful until the Lord returns.

highlights.label: Bible Study
highlights.title: Weekly Teachings
highlights.summary: Read current and previous Bible Study notes as the church grows in the Word together.

highlights.label: Events
highlights.title: Services and Appointed Seasons
highlights.summary: Follow weekly gatherings, special events, and the appointed feasts of the Lord.

highlights.label: Ministries
highlights.title: Find Your Place to Serve
highlights.summary: Connect through prayer, worship, youth, women, men, children, outreach, and practical service.
